title: disocactus crenatus subsp. kimnachii
intro: Disocactus crenatus subsp. kimnachii, also known as the Mexican climbing column cactus, is a subspecies of flowering cactus native to Mexico. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits, such as wound healing and the alleviation of skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of Disocactus crenatus subsp. kimnachii also include its use as an antiseptic and its potential to reduce fever. However, I can't reply about specific herbal preparations as this information is not readily available.
